rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces local school district property tax revenue, requiring commissioner rulemaking adjustments to Chapter 48 funding elements to match appropriation levels.
quote: The rules may provide for the commissioner to make necessary adjustments to the provisions of Chapter 48, including providing for the commissioner to make an adjustment in the funding element established by Section 48.202
_note: Educ. Code §49.006 is a rulemaking/adjustment authority, not a substantive constraint on homestead exemption amounts. The proposed change triggers commissioner adjustment authority rather than conflicting with it.
